Cables.title: Power cable
Cables.description: A conduit used to carry electricity from it's source to a receiver.

SmallGenerator.title: Small generator
SmallGenerator.description: Consumes Plutonium stored in Fuel Cells to generate a small amount of electricity.

LargeGenerator.title: Large generator
LargeGenerator.description: Consumes Plutonium stored in Fuel Cells to generate a large amount of electricity. This generator is around 10% more efficient than producing the same amount of power from multiple small generators.

SmallSolarPanel.title: Small solar panel
SmallSolarPanel.description: Generates a small amount of electricity from natural light sources, such as a star.

LargeSolarPanel.title: Large solar panel
LargeSolarPanel.description: Generates a moderate amount of electricity from natural light sources, such as a star.

Battery.title: Battery
Battery.description: Stores excess electricity and redistributes it back into the grid when needed. It's a good idea to have at least one battery on your ship as soon as possible.
